feed.title: DzBoom

entry.title: As Baseball Comes Back, Dexter Fowler Misses His Family

link.title: As Baseball Comes Back, Dexter Fowler Misses His Family

entry.content:
Friday is #OpeningDay for the Cardinals, but Dexter Fowler’s family won’t be in St. Louis.
Fowler decided it was safer this season to leave his wife and children at home.
He misses them. A lot.
entry.summary: Friday is #OpeningDay for the Cardinals, but Dexter Fowler’s family won’t be in St. Louis. Fowler decided it was safer this season to leave his wife and children at home. He misses them. A lot.

entry.title: Akhir Penantian-7staccato

link.title: Akhir Penantian-7staccato

entry.content: 7Staccato suatu band dengan gendre musik Modern Rock, rythm guitar yang dahsyat, hentakan drum yang apik dan dengan vokal wanita yang sangat powerfull, membuat lagu mereka sangat menarik untuk digandrungi oleh banyak orang, khususnya anak-anak muda yang energik yang dapat memberikan semangat baru bagi mereka dan mewakili suara hati mereka, selamat menyaksikan.
entry.summary: 7Staccato suatu band dengan gendre musik Modern Rock, rythm guitar yang dahsyat, hentakan drum yang apik dan dengan vokal wanita yang sangat powerfull, membuat lagu mereka sangat menarik untuk digandrungi oleh banyak orang, khususnya anak-anak muda yang energik yang dapat memberikan semangat baru bagi mereka dan mewakili suara hati mereka, selamat menyaksikan.

entry.title: Loi contre le « séparatisme » : ce que prépare le gouvernement

link.title: Loi contre le « séparatisme » : ce que prépare le gouvernement

entry.content: Dans son discours de politique générale, Jean Castex a annoncé la préparation d’un projet de loi contre le « séparatisme » ou le repli communautaire.
entry.summary: Dans son discours de politique générale, Jean Castex a annoncé la préparation d’un projet de loi contre le « séparatisme » ou le repli communautaire.

entry.title: Essai Skoda Superb Combi 1.4 TSI 218 PHEV Sportline 2020

link.title: Essai Skoda Superb Combi 1.4 TSI 218 PHEV Sportline 2020

entry.content: La première hybride rechargeable de Skoda, c’est elle : la Skoda Superb. Elle prend pour l’occasion l’appellation iV, qui désigne les Skoda électrifiées, et elle sera bientôt rejointe par l’Octavia hybride rechargeable. Pour l’heure, cette Superb iV existe en berline ou en break comme ici et utilise la même chaîne cinématique que sur la Passat GTE avec un 1,4 TSI associé à un moteur électrique pour une puissance cumulée de 218 ch. La batterie est annoncée à 13 kWh et Skoda annonce 56 km d’autonomie électrique : on a bien-sûr mesuré par nous-même, verdict à la fin. En attendant, on sait que l’espace intérieur de la Superb est un de ses gros atouts, mais que les batteries des hybrides rechargeables mangent de la place : allons voir comment elle s’en sort !
entry.summary: La première hybride rechargeable de Skoda, c’est elle : la Skoda Superb. Elle prend pour l’occasion l’appellation iV, qui désigne les Skoda électrifiées, et elle sera bientôt rejointe par l’Octavia hybride rechargeable. Pour l’heure, cette Superb iV existe en berline ou en break comme ici et utilise la même chaîne cinématique que sur la Passat GTE avec un 1,4 TSI associé à un moteur électrique pour une puissance cumulée de 218 ch. La batterie est annoncée à 13 kWh et Skoda annonce 56 km d’autonomie électrique : on a bien-sûr mesuré par nous-même, verdict à la fin. En attendant, on sait que l’espace intérieur de la Superb est un de ses gros atouts, mais que les batteries des hybrides rechargeables mangent de la place : allons voir comment elle s’en sort !

entry.title: Chelsea To Swap Kepa Plus £70M For Jan Oblak! Transfer Talk

link.title: Chelsea To Swap Kepa Plus £70M For Jan Oblak! Transfer Talk

entry.content:
This week we start by focusing on Manchester City, and what the end of their European ban could mean for their summer activity. Already a number of names have been thrown about, but we are looking at David Alaba and Napoli sensation Kalidou Koulibaly.
We also look at their competition with Manchester United for the signature of Inter Milan’s Milan Skriniar, and the Red Devil’s own pursuit of Leicester City’s Ben Chilwell.
Our headline story, however, is the stunning news Chelsea are planning an audacious swap deal that will see Kepa Arrizabalaga head to Atletico Madrid in return for Jan Oblak.. What a transfer that would be!
Finally we explore activity at Norwich City and Southampton, where big names look to be coming and going.
entry.summary: This week we start by focusing on Manchester City, and what the end of their European ban could mean for their summer activity. Already a number of names have been thrown about, but we are looking at David Alaba and Napoli sensation Kalidou Koulibaly. We also look at their competition with Manchester United for the signature of Inter Milan’s Milan Skriniar, and the Red Devil’s own pursuit of Leicester City’s Ben Chilwell. Our headline story, however, is the stunning news Chelsea are planning an audacious swap deal that will see Kepa Arrizabalaga head to Atletico Madrid in return for Jan Oblak.. What a transfer that would be! Finally we explore activity at Norwich City and Southampton, where big names look to be coming and going.

link.title: The NFL Will Require All Fans to Wear Face Masks at Games in 2020

entry.content:
If you plan on attending an NFL game in 2020, be sure to bring a face mask.
The NFL Will Require All Fans to Wear Face Masks at Games in 2020
The NFL Will Require All Fans to Wear Face Masks at Games in 2020
The NFL Will Require All Fans to Wear Face Masks at Games in 2020
entry.summary: If you plan on attending an NFL game in 2020, be sure to bring a face mask. The NFL Will Require All Fans to Wear Face Masks at Games in 2020 The NFL Will Require All Fans to Wear Face Masks at Games in 2020 The NFL Will Require All Fans to Wear Face Masks at Games in 2020

entry.title: Bantuan Alat Kesehatan Untuk Pemerintah Provinsi Jawa Timur

link.title: Bantuan Alat Kesehatan Untuk Pemerintah Provinsi Jawa Timur

entry.content:
SURABAYA, JAWA TIMUR - Kepala Staf Angkatan Darat, Jenderal TNI Andika Perkasa memberikan bantuan material kesehatan ke Pemerintah Provinsi Jawa Timur. Bantuan tersebut disalurkan ke RSUD dr. Sutomo Surabaya, yang menjadi rumah sakit rujukan Covid-19.
Penyerahan bantuan dari Kepala Staf Angkatan Darat Jenderal TNI Andika Perkasa diwakilkan kepada Pangdam V Brawijaya, Mayjend TNI Widodo Iryansyah.
Bantuan berupa material kesehatan dan penambah imun, yakni prophylaxis, diberikan langsung kepada Gubernur Jawa Timur, Khofifah Indar Parawansa.
Pangdam V Brawijaya, Mayjend Tni Widodo Iryansyah menjelaskan bantuan material kesehatan yang diberikan berupa lampu ultraviolet, hand sanitizer, ribuan botol madu, dan ribuan botol sanitizer spray.
Gubernur Jawa Timur, Khofifah Indar Parawansa berterima kasih dengan bantuan tersebut, karena dapat membantu tenaga kesehatan. Bantuan akan disalurkan ke RSUD dr. Sutomo Surabaya, yang menjadi rumah sakit rujukan pasien Covid-19.
Sementara itu, untuk mempermudah memantau kondisi para tenaga kesehatan, Khofifah mengintegrasikan seluruh koordinasi medis di satu titik, yakni di Rumah Sakit Darurat Surabaya.
#BantuanAlatKesehatan #PemprovJatim #TNIAD
entry.summary: SURABAYA, JAWA TIMUR - Kepala Staf Angkatan Darat, Jenderal TNI Andika Perkasa memberikan bantuan material kesehatan ke Pemerintah Provinsi Jawa Timur. Bantuan tersebut disalurkan ke RSUD dr. Sutomo Surabaya, yang menjadi rumah sakit rujukan Covid-19. Penyerahan bantuan dari Kepala Staf Angkatan Darat Jenderal TNI Andika Perkasa diwakilkan kepada Pangdam V Brawijaya, Mayjend TNI Widodo Iryansyah. Bantuan berupa material kesehatan dan penambah imun, yakni prophylaxis, diberikan langsung kepada Gubernur Jawa Timur, Khofifah Indar Parawansa. Pangdam V Brawijaya, Mayjend Tni Widodo Iryansyah menjelaskan bantuan material kesehatan yang diberikan berupa lampu ultraviolet, hand sanitizer, ribuan botol madu, dan ribuan botol sanitizer spray. Gubernur Jawa Timur, Khofifah Indar Parawansa berterima kasih dengan bantuan tersebut, karena dapat membantu tenaga kesehatan. Bantuan akan disalurkan ke RSUD dr. Sutomo Surabaya, yang menjadi rumah sakit rujukan pasien Covid-19. Sementara itu, untuk mempermudah memantau kondisi para tenaga kesehatan, Khofifah mengintegrasikan seluruh koordinasi medis di satu titik, yakni di Rumah Sakit Darurat Surabaya. #BantuanAlatKesehatan #PemprovJatim #TNIAD

entry.title: 12 Things humans cannot do!

link.title: 12 Things humans cannot do!

entry.content:
Nothing is out of reach if we aim high, but there are some things which most humans cannot do just because our bodies made a certain way.
Have a look at this video and tell us if you were able to do any of it?
entry.summary: Nothing is out of reach if we aim high, but there are some things which most humans cannot do just because our bodies made a certain way. Have a look at this video and tell us if you were able to do any of it?

entry.title: LIVE REPORT: Buruh hingga Mahasiswa Demo Tolak RUU Cipta Kerja

link.title: LIVE REPORT: Buruh hingga Mahasiswa Demo Tolak RUU Cipta Kerja

entry.content:
Sejumlah organisasi masyarakat yang tergabung dalam Aliansi Nasional Antikomunis (ANAKNKRI) kembali menggelar unjuk rasa di depan Gedung MPR-DPR RI, Jakarta Pusat, hari ini Kamis (16/7/2020).
Unjuk rasa tersebut masih memiliki agenda yang sama yakni menuntut DPR untuk mencabut rancangan undang-undang haluan ideologi pancasila (RUU HIP) dari program legislasi nasional (prolegnas).
Artikel Terkait:
Adapun massa yang berkumpul pertama dari kubu Persaudaraan Alumni (PA 212), FPI, dan kawan-kawan. Mereka tampak sudah berkumpul dengan tuntutan menolak dan mendesak pembatalan RUU HIP. Selengkapnya, tonton Live Streamingnya di atas.
Video Editor: Yulita Futty Hpasari
==================================
Homepage:
Facebook Fan Page:
Instagram:
Twitter:
entry.summary: Sejumlah organisasi masyarakat yang tergabung dalam Aliansi Nasional Antikomunis (ANAKNKRI) kembali menggelar unjuk rasa di depan Gedung MPR-DPR RI, Jakarta Pusat, hari ini Kamis (16/7/2020). Unjuk rasa tersebut masih memiliki agenda yang sama yakni menuntut DPR untuk mencabut rancangan undang-undang haluan ideologi pancasila (RUU HIP) dari program legislasi nasional (prolegnas). Artikel Terkait: Adapun massa yang berkumpul pertama dari kubu Persaudaraan Alumni (PA 212), FPI, dan kawan-kawan. Mereka tampak sudah berkumpul dengan tuntutan menolak dan mendesak pembatalan RUU HIP. Selengkapnya, tonton Live Streamingnya di atas. Video Editor: Yulita Futty Hpasari ================================== Homepage: Facebook Fan Page: Instagram: Twitter:

entry.title: Deca-Dence episode 3 English sub デカダンス 3

link.title: Deca-Dence episode 3 English sub デカダンス 3

entry.content:
Deca-Dence episode 3 English sub デカダンス 3
Deca-Dence episode 3		 English sub
Summary
Many years have passed since humanity was driven to the brink of extinction by the sudden emergence of the unknown life forms Gadoll. Those humans that survived now dwell in a 3000 meter-high mobile fortress Decadence built to protect themselves from the Gadoll threat. Denizens of Decadence fall into two categories: Gears, warriors who fight the Gadoll daily, and Tankers, those without the skills to fight. One day, Natsume, a Tanker girl who dreams of becoming a Gear meets surly Kaburagi, an armor repairman of Decadence. This chance meeting between the seemingly two opposites, the girl with a positive attitude who never gives up on her dreams and the realist who has given up on his, will eventually shake the future course of this world.
Follow for more episodes!
entry.summary: Deca-Dence episode 3 English sub デカダンス 3 Deca-Dence episode 3 English sub Summary Many years have passed since humanity was driven to the brink of extinction by the sudden emergence of the unknown life forms Gadoll. Those humans that survived now dwell in a 3000 meter-high mobile fortress Decadence built to protect themselves from the Gadoll threat. Denizens of Decadence fall into two categories: Gears, warriors who fight the Gadoll daily, and Tankers, those without the skills to fight. One day, Natsume, a Tanker girl who dreams of becoming a Gear meets surly Kaburagi, an armor repairman of Decadence. This chance meeting between the seemingly two opposites, the girl with a positive attitude who never gives up on her dreams and the realist who has given up on his, will eventually shake the future course of this world. Follow for more episodes!

entry.title: Kanye West claims wife Kim Kardashian West tried to fly out with a doctor to ‘lock him up’

link.title: Kanye West claims wife Kim Kardashian West tried to fly out with a doctor to ‘lock him up’

entry.content: Kanye West has made several claims in a lengthy Twitter rant, including that his wife Kim Kardashian West tried to "fly to Wyoming with a doctor to lock me up" after he cried and said the couple had considered aborting their first child during his first-ever presidential rally on Sunday (18.07.20).
entry.summary: Kanye West has made several claims in a lengthy Twitter rant, including that his wife Kim Kardashian West tried to "fly to Wyoming with a doctor to lock me up" after he cried and said the couple had considered aborting their first child during his first-ever presidential rally on Sunday (18.07.20).

entry.title: Le Snap #10 : Un TikTok présidentiel

link.title: Le Snap #10 : Un TikTok présidentiel

entry.content: Emmanuel Macron publie pour la première fois une vidéo sur TikTok pour féliciter les bacheliers, les géants américains du numérique inquiets face à la situation politique à Hong-Kong, mais aussi le robot-chien Spot qui joue les pom-pom girls… Le meilleur du web de la semaine écoulée est dans Le Snap.
entry.summary: Emmanuel Macron publie pour la première fois une vidéo sur TikTok pour féliciter les bacheliers, les géants américains du numérique inquiets face à la situation politique à Hong-Kong, mais aussi le robot-chien Spot qui joue les pom-pom girls… Le meilleur du web de la semaine écoulée est dans Le Snap.
